ham.subject: Your Account: Transaction Alert - INR 5,000 Debited
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We hope you are doing well. This is a notification from your bank regarding a recent transaction on your account.

Date: 15-Apr-2026
Amount: INR 5,000
Merchant: XYZ Retail
Reference No.: 9876543210

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this debit or suspect any unauthorized activity, please contact our customer support immediately at 1800-123-456 or visit your nearest branch.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
Customer Support Team

---
This message was sent automatically. Please do not reply to this email.

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: HR Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Aapke payroll system me ek urgent update aaya hai. Due to recent changes in our payroll processing platform, we need you to verify and update your bank account details as soon as possible.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process within the next 24 hours:
<URL>

Yadi aap 24 ghante ke andar update nahi karte, to aapke salary payment delay ho sakti hai. Isliye, please take immediate action.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best Regards,
HR Payroll Team

---
Please do not reply to this email. For any queries, contact hr@company.com.
